extortion.description: Case Parts Company are a 45 year-old commercial refrigeration parts distributor and light manufacturer.  Our staff of 66 employees service three fully independent branch operations in St. Louis, Seattle and world headquarters in Los Angeles. Our customer base is national in scope. We add about 100 new customers per month.SITE: www.caseparts.com Address : 877 Monterey Pass Road Monterey Park, CA 91754, US
